Description: Balmertown is part of the Red Lake gold district in Ontario, Canada, known for high-grade gold deposits in the Balmer Assemblage of Archean rocks. The district has produced over 30 million ounces of gold.

Located in Coleman, Alberta, this historic coalfield was one of Western Canada’s most productive. It includes mine entries, surface plants, rail links, and community elements illustrating coal mining history.
Near Charlotte, NC, this lithium mine is being redeveloped by Albemarle to resume open-pit mining. It was idle since the 1990s.

An active kaolinite quarry in albite-lepidolite granite near Échassières, France. Known for minerals like wavellite and plumbogummite. The quarry shows mineral changes during alteration, including replacement of lepidolite with muscovite.

A high-grade copper-cobalt mine in Lualaba Province, DRC. Jointly owned by Nzuri Copper (85%), GICC (10%), and the DRC government (5%). Expected to produce ~18,657 tons of copper and 1,370 tons of cobalt annually.
Ancient copper mine in the DRC, active since 1903. Notable source of carving-grade malachite.
Also known as the Super Pit, it's Australia’s largest open-cut gold mine, producing nearly 21 tonnes of gold annually.
A tantalum-lithium-cesium mine in a 2.67-billion-year-old pegmatite. Owned by Tantalum Mining Corp. of Canada (TANCO).
A large open-pit lithium mine owned by Albemarle. Hosts lithia-bearing granite pegmatite and is known for rare phosphates and silicates.
China’s largest Li-Be-Nb-Ta-Cs pegmatite deposit in the Altai belt. Worked for several rare elements. Mining ended in 1999.
Located in Rwanda, this mine contains unusual aluminum- and iron-manganese-rich phosphate pegmatite.
Mines gold and tungsten. Located on the Aidyrlya river, a tributary of the Suunduk in the Ural river basin.
Located in Eritrea, it's an open-pit VMS deposit producing Zn, Cu, Au, and Ag.
Active uranium mine in Niger with 109.1 million tonnes of ore (0.06% U). Joint venture between Areva and SOPaMin.
Located in Tsumeb, Namibia. An open-cast mine known for a variety of rare minerals. It is one of the top 100 geological heritage sites globally.
